title: schefflera pachycephala
intro: Schefflera pachycephala, also known as the variegated schefflera, is a type of evergreen flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The medicinal properties of the Schefflera pachycephala plant include its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and as an antiseptic. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function, due to its high antioxidant content. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are consumed to treat various ailments.
